name: Stumberg, Eric

evidence: Multiple sources (TengoInternet's own site, Praxis, Crunchbase) identify Eric Stumberg as co-founder and CEO of TengoInternet, which he founded in 2002 to provide commercial-grade outdoor Wi-Fi to outdoor lodging; the company is headquartered in Austin and has installed internet at 3,000+ RV parks, campgrounds, hotels and marinas across 48 states, Canada and Mexico. This matches the filing's employer strings ('TENGOINTERNET INC.','Tengointernet Inc.') and occupations ('CEO','Chief Executive Officer') exactly, and the Austin HQ is consistent with donor zip 78751. Notable: 179 FEC gifts at 0.006 partisan lean — i.e. an almost uniformly Republican federal donor — while giving $900 to Kirk Watson.

name: Thompson, Lance
evidence: No occupation or employer was reported in the filing and none could be established from public sources. Public-records aggregators (Spokeo, ClustrMaps) place a Lance M Thompson at 1401 Hardouin Avenue, Austin 78703 — the same address and zip as donor Dawn D Thompson of Dawn Thompson Interiors, who appears in this same batch and gave an identical $900 on the identical date (2022-12-12) to Kirk Watson — so he is very likely her spouse/household member. That establishes the household, not his career: per the rules no industry is assigned, since a spouse's occupation is not evidence of his own. 136 FEC gifts at 0.316 partisan lean (predominantly Republican federally). Note 'Lance Thompson' is a common name; a different Lance A Thompson appears in Austin zip 78758 and is NOT this donor.

name: Thompson, Dawn
resolved_employer: Owner, Dawn Thompson Interiors, L.L.C. (Austin residential and commercial interior design firm, 1401 Hardouin Avenue, Austin 78703)
evidence: Dawn Thompson Interiors is an Austin residential and commercial interior design firm specializing in new developments and collaborating with architects and lighting designers; its listed address, 1401 Hardouin Avenue, Austin 78703, matches the donor's zip 78703 exactly, and public records place Dawn D Thompson at that same address for 13+ years — so the business is run from her home, tying person, firm and zip together. This matches the filing's employer ('Dawn Thompson Interiors') and occupation ('Interior Design'). She is a native Texan and the twin sister of designer Darby Denison; the two once worked as a design duo and now run separate firms. Her portfolio includes Hill Country work with Lake|Flato Architects. Taxonomy note: Architecture is used as the design-professions bucket (per prior batches' handling of interior designers at design firms); she reports a firm rather than 'self', so Self-Employed was not used. No FEC donation history. Gave the same $900 on the same day as household member Lance Thompson, also in this batch.

name: Knox, Bruce
resolved_employer: Partner/owner, Apex Sports and Entertainment, LLC (Austin; entity itself not verifiable in public registries). Probably the Austin-area Bruce Knox who was Executive VP of Circuit of the Americas (COTA) until early 2014 and, in 2011, President and CEO of Formula One United States; earlier co-founder, CEO and director of Interactive Remarketing, once the largest seller on eBay Motors.
evidence: The industry rests on the self-reported employer: the filing lists 'Apex Sports and Entertainment, LLC' with occupations 'Partner','Owner', which places him in sports/entertainment regardless of which Bruce Knox he is. Identification of the individual is probable but unconfirmed: a Bruce Knox in the Austin metro area (LinkedIn) was COTA's executive vice president — one of the track's longest-tenured employees, with COTA from 2010 until his departure in early 2014 — and was President and CEO of Formula One United States in 2011, a career profile that fits a partner in a sports-and-entertainment LLC and is consistent with donor zip 78756 (central Austin). Confidence is held at medium because no public registry entry, website or filing for 'Apex Sports and Entertainment, LLC' in Austin could be found (searches surfaced only unrelated same-named firms in Jackson, MS and elsewhere), so the COTA executive could not be linked to the donor's stated employer directly. Gave to Kirk Watson, with gifts running 2022-12-11 through 2024-11-01; 25 FEC gifts at 0.237 partisan lean (predominantly Republican federally).

name: Thomas, Christina

evidence: High Five Events is verified as an Austin-based event production company that grew from a single 2003 triathlon into one of the largest privately owned event production companies in the U.S., producing the Austin Marathon and other events; its Austin base is consistent with donor zip 78757. Gave $850 to Kirk Watson across 2022-2024; 43 FEC gifts at 1.0 partisan lean (uniformly Democratic).

name: Collier, Chad
resolved_employer: Vice President of Food Safety, Lone Star Beef Processors, L.P. (San Angelo, TX beef processing plant with capacity to slaughter 1,400+ head of cattle daily)
confidence_note: Confidence is high on the identification; industry is null only because meat processing / agriculture has no label in the taxonomy.
evidence: LinkedIn and ZoomInfo both identify Chad Collier as Vice President of Food Safety at Lone Star Beef Processors in San Angelo, where he oversees food safety protocols and regulatory compliance; he holds a biology degree from Angelo State University (San Angelo). This matches the filing's employer ('Lone Star Beef'), occupation ('Manager') and location (San Angelo, TX 76901 — Lone Star Beef's home city) on all three points, so the identification is solid. Industry is left null because the taxonomy has no agriculture/food-processing/manufacturing label and none of the available labels fits a beef packing plant — the same treatment given to cattle-trading CEO James Schwertner in an earlier batch. Worth flagging for review: he is an out-of-town San Angelo donor giving $850 to Austin council member Vanessa Fuentes over 2020-2023, roughly 220 miles from his home and workplace, with no FEC history and no discoverable connection to Austin city politics; the reason for the giving relationship is unexplained.
